image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_shot: shot S034. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: Lin Che descends into a basement area.; He sees a mirror covered with a cloth.; From behind the cloth, the sound of fingernails tapping glass is heard. narration intent: Narrator explains "In the basement, a mirror is covered with cloth. From behind it comes the sound of fingernails tapping glass.". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "Who's in there?". shot positive notes: Wide shot of a dimly lit basement, Lin Che standing before a cloth-covered mirror, eerie atmosphere, single light source casting shadows, suspenseful composition.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. shot S034. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: Lin Che descends into a basement area.; He sees a mirror covered with a cloth.; From behind the cloth, the sound of fingernails tapping glass is heard. narration intent: Narrator explains "In the basement, a mirror is covered with cloth. From behind it comes the sound of fingernails tapping glass.". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "Who's in there?". shot positive notes: Wide shot of a dimly lit basement, Lin Che standing before a cloth-covered mirror, eerie atmosphere, single light source casting shadows, suspenseful composition.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, bright, cluttered, modern elements., face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: In the basement, a mirror is covered with cloth. From behind it comes the sound of fingernails tapping glass.

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
